mnemonics.title: Flynn's Taxonomy Acronyms
mnemonics.content: Remember the four categories using the phrase: **S**illy **S**nakes **M**unch **M**any **D**onuts. This maps to SISD, SIMD, MISD, MIMD. The first letter is the Instruction stream (Single/Multiple), the second letter is the Data stream (Single/Multiple).

mnemonics.title: SIMD Core Idea
mnemonics.content: Think **S**ingle **I**nstructor, **M**any **D**ancers. One instructor (Control Unit) shouts a move (Instruction), and all dancers (Processing Elements) perform the same move at the same time, but in their own personal space (on their own Data).
